mnemonics: Smart Girls Read Books (SGRB) - Search for the Right Book
B Brady Bunch - Brute Force String Matching
keyPoints: Definition: Sequence of characters to be searched for within a string
Two approaches: Brute Force and Sequential Search
Brute Force Algorithm: Exhaustively checks every substring of the same length as the pattern
Sequential Search Algorithm: Compares characters one by one from left to right
Time Complexity: O(n*m) for Brute Force, O(n) for Sequential Search
Space Complexity: O(1) for both algorithms
